heroImageAlt: Diagram showing a production AI agent pipeline being redirected from an older model version to GPT-5.6

imageSuggestions.placement: After the intro, before 'What 2.2x faster, 27% cheaper means'
imageSuggestions.concept: A simple before/after diagram of an agent pipeline showing latency and cost metrics changing across a model swap
imageSuggestions.altText: Before and after diagram of AI agent latency and cost metrics during a model migration

imageSuggestions.concept: A checklist graphic listing the six migration steps as a visual workflow
imageSuggestions.altText: Visual checklist of steps for migrating a production AI agent to a new model version
